qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Consider the following three schedules of transactions T1, T2 and T3. [Notation: In the following NYO represents the action Y (R for read, W for write) performed by transaction N on object O.] Which of the following statements is TRUE? A. S1, S2 and S3 are all conflict equivalent to each other B. No

qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Consider two relations describing teams and players in a sports league: teams(tid, tname): tid, tname are team-id and team-name, respectively players(pid,pname,tid): pid, pname, and tid denote player-id, playername and the team-id of the player,
